blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,124 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
